CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula:
IF (Count_of_Products__c >0,"",'•Add Product;') & IF( AND( IsClosed = False , fxStageNumber__c <=5
, OR ( CloseDate < Today()-31 , CloseDate > Today()+3650 /*Ten years out as a buffer*/ ) ) ,'•Verify Close Date;' ,"" ) & IF( OR( Revenue_Rec_Date__c < CloseDate , Revenue_Rec_Date__c > CloseDate+365 ) ,'•Verify Rev Rec Date;' ,"" ) & IF(AND( TEXT(Sales_Type__c) = 'Service Sales' ,fxRecordTypeDevName__c = 'PKI_Americas_SPI' ) ,IF(SOW_Complete_Checkbox__c=true,"",'•SOW Complete;') & IF(Pricing_approved_internally_Checkbox__c=true,"",'•Pricing Approval;') ,"" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage5
